name: Dev — solo technical founder building an AI product

goals: move fast without hiring a PM
keep product thinking rigorous while coding all day
run everything locally to control costs
frustrations: loses track of why past decisions were made
profile.behaviour: Opens dev tools, inspects network calls, judges the product by its architecture. Loves local-first on principle. Bounces instantly off anything that feels like enterprise software.
profile.technicalAbility: expert — will read your source code
profile.preferredWorkflow: CLI and keyboard, self-hosted, BYO model
profile.budgetSensitivity: high for subscriptions, generous for one-time purchases
profile.decisionStyle: instant gut call, reversible; lifetime deal is an easy yes if the tech impresses
